headline: Supermicro Appoints Vik Malyala as Chief Business Officer
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., May 11, 2026--Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) ("Supermicro" or the "Company"), an AI, Enterprise, Storage, and 5G/Edge Total IT Solution Provider featuring Data Center Building Block Solutions® (DCBBS), today announced the appointment of Vik Malyala as Chief Business Officer. Mr. Malyala will be responsible for building partnerships and driving business development with major technology partners.

Mr. Malyala will be responsible for building partnerships and driving business development with major technology partners.

headline: Dell Stock Is Up 99% This Year. Why UBS Says the AI Rally Is Tapped Out.
summary: Dell Technologies  has been one of the highest-flying stocks in the  index this year, but it might be time to take some chips off the table, according to UBS.  The investment bank downgraded Dell shares to Neutral from Buy in a research note over the weekend, although it lifted its price target to $243 from $167.  Dell’s server business is in excellent shape, UBS argued, but demand from artificial-intelligence companies is already baked into the stock price.
